all.en: The Huang family had been packing boxes for three weeks before the big moving day.
all.zh: 在搬家大日子之前，黃家已經打包紙箱打了三個禮拜。

all.en: At seven in the morning, the moving truck pulled up in front of their old apartment.
all.zh: 早上七點，搬家貨車停在他們舊公寓前。

all.en: Two strong workers began carrying the heavy furniture down four flights of stairs.
all.zh: 兩個強壯的工人開始把笨重家具搬下四層樓的樓梯。

all.en: Mom kept checking her list to make sure nothing important was left behind.
all.zh: 媽媽不停確認她的清單，確保沒有重要的東西被遺忘。

all.en: Dad accidentally dropped a box labeled "fragile" and the family held their breath.
all.zh: 爸爸不小心摔了一個標示「易碎」的箱子，全家人都屏住了呼吸。

all.en: "It's just the kitchen pots," he said with relief, picking up the box again.
all.zh: 「只是廚房的鍋子，」他鬆了口氣說，再次把箱子撿起來。

all.en: Their son Eric refused to leave his bedroom until Mom promised to set it up first.
all.zh: 他們的兒子艾瑞克不肯離開自己房間，直到媽媽答應第一個布置他的房間。

all.en: His little sister Joy played with bubble wrap and made popping noises for an hour.
all.zh: 他的小妹喬伊玩泡泡紙，發出爆破聲響玩了一個小時。

all.en: By noon, they finally arrived at their new apartment in the suburbs.
all.zh: 中午時，他們終於抵達了郊區的新公寓。

all.en: The new place was bigger, brighter, and had a small garden in the back.
all.zh: 新家更大、更明亮，後面還有一個小花園。

all.en: Mom ordered fried chicken and the family sat on the bare floor to eat their first meal.
all.zh: 媽媽訂了炸雞，全家人坐在光禿禿的地板上吃下他們的第一餐。

all.en: Even though they were exhausted, everyone felt excited about starting this new chapter.
all.zh: 雖然大家都累壞了，但每個人都對展開這個新篇章感到興奮。

all.en: As promised, Eric's bedroom was the first to be fully set up before sunset.
all.zh: 如同承諾，艾瑞克的房間在日落前就率先整理好了。

all.en: He arranged his books, posters, and model cars exactly the way they had been in the old place.
all.zh: 他把書、海報和模型車擺得跟舊家一模一樣。

all.en: Joy claimed the room with the biggest window because she wanted to watch the stars at night.
all.zh: 喬伊搶下窗戶最大的房間，因為她想晚上看星星。

all.en: Dad spent two hours assembling a new bookshelf that came with confusing instructions.
all.zh: 爸爸花了兩個小時組裝一個說明書讓人摸不著頭緒的新書櫃。

all.en: Mom hung up family photos in the hallway to make the new place feel like home.
all.zh: 媽媽在走廊掛上全家福，讓新家更有家的感覺。

all.en: On the second day, the friendly neighbor next door brought over a plate of homemade cookies.
all.zh: 第二天，隔壁的友善鄰居端來一盤親手做的餅乾。

all.en: She introduced herself and offered to show the family the best places to shop nearby.
all.zh: 她介紹自己，並提議帶這家人認識附近最好的購物地點。

all.en: Eric explored the small garden and discovered a little frog hiding behind a flower pot.
all.zh: 艾瑞克到小花園探險，發現一隻小青蛙躲在花盆後面。

all.en: Joy decided that the garden would be the perfect spot for her future birthday parties.
all.zh: 喬伊認定這座花園是她未來生日派對的完美地點。

all.en: By the end of the week, the new apartment finally felt warm, lived-in, and truly theirs.
all.zh: 到那週結束時，新公寓終於變得溫馨、有人味，真正屬於他們了。

all.en: By the second week, the Huang family had unpacked nearly every box except a few in the garage.
all.zh: 到了第二週，黃家除了車庫裡的幾箱以外，幾乎所有箱子都拆開了。

all.en: Mom suggested they invite the friendly neighbor over for dinner as a small thank-you gift.
all.zh: 媽媽提議邀請那位友善的鄰居過來吃晚餐，當作小小的謝禮。

all.en: Dad grilled some fresh fish in the garden, filling the whole neighborhood with a delicious smell.
all.zh: 爸爸在花園烤了些新鮮的魚，整個社區都飄著誘人的香味。

all.en: The neighbor brought her teenage daughter, who quickly became friends with Joy and Eric.
all.zh: 鄰居帶著她青春期的女兒一起來，那女孩很快就和喬伊及艾瑞克成為朋友。

all.en: After dinner, the three kids ran around the garden chasing fireflies until it grew dark.
all.zh: 晚餐後，三個孩子在花園裡追螢火蟲，一直玩到天黑。

all.en: Joy declared that fireflies in the backyard were even better than any birthday party decoration.
all.zh: 喬伊宣布後院的螢火蟲比任何生日派對裝飾都還要棒。

all.en: Eric showed his new friend the little frog, which now lived happily under the big flower pot.
all.zh: 艾瑞克帶他的新朋友去看那隻小青蛙，現在牠開心地住在大花盆底下。

all.en: Mom and the neighbor exchanged phone numbers and promised to share homemade meals every month.
all.zh: 媽媽和鄰居交換了電話，約好每個月分享自家做的料理。

all.en: Dad realized that moving had not just changed their address, but had opened a new social chapter.
all.zh: 爸爸領悟到搬家不只是換了地址，更開啟了一段新的社交篇章。

all.en: That night, Joy fell asleep counting the stars from her huge window, feeling completely at home.
all.zh: 那晚，喬伊望著她那扇大窗戶數星星睡著了，感到完全有家的感覺。

all.en: By the end of the first month, the Huang family had explored every coffee shop within walking distance.
all.zh: 第一個月結束時，黃家已經把走路可達的每家咖啡店都逛遍了。

all.en: Eric joined the local cycling club and made two new friends who lived just three blocks away.
all.zh: 艾瑞克加入了當地的自行車社團，結識了兩位住在三個街區外的新朋友。

all.en: Joy started attending a weekend art class at the community center near the bus stop.
all.zh: 喬伊開始在公車站附近的社區中心參加週末美術課。

all.en: Mom planted herbs along the garden fence, including basil, mint, and fresh coriander.
all.zh: 媽媽沿著花園圍籬種了香草，包括羅勒、薄荷和新鮮香菜。

all.en: Dad turned the corner of the garage into a small workshop for his weekend woodworking projects.
all.zh: 爸爸把車庫一角改造成小型工作室，做他週末的木工計畫。

all.en: The friendly neighbor's daughter began studying with Joy and Eric every Thursday after school.
all.zh: 那位友善鄰居的女兒每週四放學後都會來和喬伊及艾瑞克一起讀書。

all.en: Joy proudly hung her first finished painting on her bedroom wall facing the huge window.
all.zh: 喬伊得意地把她第一幅完成的畫掛在房間裡正對大窗戶的牆上。

all.en: Eric trained the little garden frog by gently placing crumbs near its favorite flower pot every day.
all.zh: 艾瑞克每天輕輕在花盆旁放麵包屑，試圖訓練那隻花園裡的小青蛙。

all.en: Mom organized a small block barbecue and invited four neighboring families to celebrate the season.
all.zh: 媽媽舉辦了一場小型社區烤肉，邀請了四戶鄰居一起慶祝這個季節。

all.en: Dad watched the children play across the street and finally felt this neighborhood was truly home.
all.zh: 爸爸看著孩子們在街上玩耍，終於覺得這個社區真正成了家。

all.en: As autumn arrived, Eric planted a small maple tree near the corner of the family garden.
all.zh: 秋天來臨時，艾瑞克在家庭花園的角落種下一棵小楓樹。

all.en: Joy decorated her bedroom door with paper leaves she had cut during her weekend art class.
all.zh: 喬伊用她在週末美術課剪出來的紙葉子，裝飾自己房間的門。

all.en: Mom collected fresh basil and made a fragrant pesto sauce that everyone praised at dinner.
all.zh: 媽媽採了新鮮羅勒，做出一道香氣四溢的青醬，全家人在晚餐時都讚不絕口。

all.en: Dad finished building a small wooden bench and placed it under the maple tree for quiet reading.
all.zh: 爸爸做好了一張小木長椅，擺在楓樹下做為安靜閱讀的角落。

all.en: The friendly neighbor brought over a homemade pumpkin pie to celebrate the start of the autumn season.
all.zh: 友善的鄰居端來自製的南瓜派，慶祝秋天季節的開始。

all.en: Eric trained the little garden frog to hop closer when he tapped softly on the flower pot rim.
all.zh: 艾瑞克訓練那隻小青蛙，只要他輕輕敲花盆邊緣，牠就會跳近一點。

all.en: Joy hosted her very first birthday party in the garden, with fairy lights twinkling on every branch.
all.zh: 喬伊在花園裡舉辦了她的第一場生日派對，每根枝椏上都閃爍著小燈串。

all.en: Her classmates loved the fireflies, the bench, and the tiny frog that briefly appeared in the evening.
all.zh: 她的同學們愛上了螢火蟲、長椅，還有那隻在傍晚短暫現身的小青蛙。

all.en: Mom realized the new apartment had truly grown into the heart of all their happiest memories.
all.zh: 媽媽體會到，新公寓已真正成為他們所有最快樂回憶的核心。

all.en: Dad raised his coffee cup at sunset and quietly toasted the moving day chaos that started it all.
all.zh: 爸爸在日落時舉起咖啡杯，靜靜地向那一切的起點，那場搬家日的混亂致敬。

all.en: By the second spring in the new apartment, the family had decorated every corner with personal memories.
all.zh: 搬進新公寓的第二個春天，全家已把每個角落都用屬於他們的回憶妝點起來。

all.en: Joy planted three rose bushes near the bench, watering them carefully every morning before school.
all.zh: 喬伊在長椅旁種了三棵玫瑰，每天上學前都細心地澆水。

all.en: Mom hosted a small housewarming dinner and invited the elderly couple who had lived next door for years.
all.zh: 媽媽辦了一場小型喬遷晚餐，邀請了在隔壁住了多年的老夫妻。

all.en: The elderly couple shared stories about the apartment's history, including the previous family who had loved it.
all.zh: 老夫妻分享了這間公寓的歷史，包括曾經深愛它的上一個家庭的故事。

all.en: Dad built a small wooden mailbox at the front gate, painting it the same blue as the front door.
all.zh: 爸爸在前門口做了一個小小的木製信箱，把它漆成和大門一樣的藍色。

all.en: Joy decorated the mailbox with hand-painted fireflies in honor of her unforgettable birthday memory.
all.zh: 喬伊在信箱上手繪螢火蟲，紀念她那場難以忘懷的生日。

all.en: One summer evening, the tiny frog reappeared, and the family welcomed it as their unofficial garden mascot.
all.zh: 某個夏夜，那隻小青蛙再次現身，全家把牠當成花園裡非官方的吉祥物迎接。

all.en: Mom hung a tiny wooden sign near the bench that read simply Home, in graceful handwritten letters.
all.zh: 媽媽在長椅旁掛上一塊小小的木牌，上面用優雅的手寫字體只寫著「家」字。

all.en: Dad began hosting Sunday coffee for the neighborhood, slowly turning the garden into a small social hub.
all.zh: 爸爸開始在週日邀請鄰居來喝咖啡，慢慢把花園變成一個溫馨的社區小聚點。

all.en: On the second anniversary of moving day, the family raised their cups together and laughed about the chaos.
all.zh: 搬家日兩週年那天，全家一起舉杯，笑著回憶那天的兵荒馬亂。

all.en: By autumn, Eric had grown taller than Mom and proudly took charge of trimming the small maple tree.
all.zh: 到了秋天，艾瑞克已經長得比媽媽還高，得意地接手修剪那棵小楓樹。

all.en: Joy painted a new sign for the garden gate, reading Welcome Home in three different languages.
all.zh: 喬伊為花園大門畫了一塊新牌子，用三種語言寫著「歡迎回家」。

all.en: Mom finally tackled the last forgotten boxes in the garage, finding a treasure chest of childhood photographs.
all.zh: 媽媽終於處理車庫裡那幾箱被遺忘的紙箱，意外挖出一箱兒時的珍貴照片。

all.en: She arranged the photos into a thick album that became the centerpiece of every weekend coffee gathering.
all.zh: 她把照片整理成一本厚厚的相簿，成了每個週末咖啡聚會的核心。

all.en: Dad's Sunday coffee tradition expanded to include nine neighbors who all brought their own homemade treats.
all.zh: 爸爸的週日咖啡傳統擴展到九位鄰居都會來，每個人都帶上自製點心。

all.en: Eric used his cycling club savings to surprise Mom with a brand new garden swing for her birthday.
all.zh: 艾瑞克用他在自行車社團攢下的錢，送了一個全新的花園鞦韆當作媽媽的生日驚喜。

all.en: Joy spent every quiet afternoon on the swing, sketching pictures of the maple tree and her three rose bushes.
all.zh: 喬伊每個寧靜的午後都坐在鞦韆上，素描那棵楓樹和她的三棵玫瑰。

all.en: The little frog returned each summer, growing slightly bigger and bolder with every passing season.
all.zh: 那隻小青蛙每個夏天都會回來，隨著季節更迭變得稍大也稍勇敢一些。

all.en: Mom recorded each frog appearance in a small notebook beside the garden bench, just for fun.
all.zh: 媽媽把每次青蛙出現的記錄寫在花園長椅旁的小筆記本裡，純粹當作樂趣。

all.en: On the third anniversary of moving day, the family agreed that their chaotic beginning had become priceless beauty.
all.zh: 搬家日三週年那天，全家一致認為當初混亂的起點如今已化作無價的美好。

all.en: The next spring, Eric proposed building a small wooden treehouse in the corner of the garden.
all.zh: 隔年春天，艾瑞克提議在花園角落搭一座小型木製樹屋。

all.en: Dad excitedly agreed and began drafting plans on a yellow notepad each evening after work.
all.zh: 爸爸興奮地答應，每天下班後就在黃色便條本上畫設計圖。

all.en: Joy insisted the treehouse must have one window that pointed directly toward the rising morning sun.
all.zh: 喬伊堅持樹屋一定要有一扇窗戶，正對著清晨升起的太陽。

all.en: Mom offered to sew small curtains and a soft cushion for the new reading nook inside the treehouse.
all.zh: 媽媽自願為樹屋裡的新閱讀角縫製小窗簾和柔軟坐墊。

all.en: Two neighborhood teenagers volunteered to help during the weekends, eager to learn basic carpentry skills.
all.zh: 兩位社區裡的青少年自願在週末來幫忙，急著想學基本的木工技巧。

all.en: By midsummer, the treehouse was finished, complete with a tiny rope ladder and a wooden trapdoor.
all.zh: 盛夏時節，樹屋已經完工，附有一道小小的繩梯和一扇木製活板門。

all.en: Joy held her first private reading session inside, sharing snacks with two close friends from school.
all.zh: 喬伊在裡面舉行了她的第一場私人讀書會，和兩位學校的好朋友分享零食。

all.en: Eric used the treehouse to plan his upcoming cycling tour route around the entire island next summer.
all.zh: 艾瑞克利用樹屋規劃他明年夏天環島自行車的路線。

all.en: Dad and Mom often climbed up together at sunset, sipping tea while looking over the quiet rooftops.
all.zh: 爸媽常常在日落時一起爬上樹屋，喝著茶，眺望寧靜的屋頂。

all.en: On the fourth anniversary of moving day, the family painted small footprints on the trapdoor as a memory.
all.zh: 搬家日四週年那天，全家在活板門上彩繪小腳印，作為珍貴的紀念。

all.en: A week later, Joy accidentally locked herself inside the treehouse for nearly an hour because the rope ladder swung sideways and tangled itself.
all.zh: 一週後，喬伊不小心把自己關在樹屋裡將近一個小時，因為繩梯側翻打結了。

all.en: Dad rescued her with a long bamboo pole and laughed so hard that he later added a backup latch to the trapdoor.
all.zh: 爸爸用一根長竹竿把她救了下來，笑到後來特地在活板門上多裝了一道備用門栓。

all.en: Mom started bringing thermos flasks of warm jasmine tea up to the treehouse during cool autumn evenings.
all.zh: 媽媽開始在涼爽的秋夜，帶保溫瓶裝的熱茉莉茶上樹屋。

all.en: Eric spent two weekends installing a tiny solar panel so the treehouse could power a small bedside reading lamp.
all.zh: 艾瑞克花了兩個週末裝設一片小型太陽能板，讓樹屋可以供電給床頭小檯燈。

all.en: The little frog from the garden somehow managed to find its way up the trunk and surprised Joy during a quiet drawing session.
all.zh: 花園裡那隻小青蛙不知怎麼地爬上了樹幹，在喬伊安靜畫畫時嚇了她一跳。

all.en: Joy decided to paint a small portrait of the frog above the trapdoor entrance, declaring it the official guardian of the treehouse.
all.zh: 喬伊決定在活板門入口上方畫一張小小的青蛙肖像，宣布牠是樹屋的正式守護者。

all.en: Eric started his round-the-island cycling journey early one Saturday morning, with the whole family waving from the painted garden gate.
all.zh: 艾瑞克某個星期六的清晨開始他的環島單車之旅，全家在彩繪的花園大門邊揮手送行。

all.en: He sent a postcard from every town he passed, and Mom taped them in chronological order along the kitchen pantry wall.
all.zh: 他每經過一個鎮就寄一張明信片回來，媽媽按時間順序貼在廚房儲藏室的牆上。

all.en: On the day Eric returned home, sun-tanned and three kilograms lighter, Joy presented him with a hand-bound travel journal she had secretly compiled.
all.zh: 艾瑞克回家那天，曬得黝黑、瘦了三公斤，喬伊送他一本她偷偷整理的手工裝訂旅行日誌。

all.en: That night, the whole family climbed into the treehouse together for the first time, squeezed shoulder to shoulder under the small solar lamp.
all.zh: 那晚全家第一次一起爬上樹屋，肩並肩擠在小小的太陽能燈下。
